prompts.title: Project Scaffold and Background
structs_added: appvars_t fields: state, score, lives, eggColumn, basketColumn, tick, eggY, eggActive, spawnDelay, eggObj*, basketObj*, brokenEggObj*, scoreLabel*, bannerObj*, brokenEggTimer
prompts.notes: All stubs empty. Background 0x867D. State starts as STATE_MENU. on_tick increments tick.

prompts.title: Basket Sprite on Screen
prompts.notes: Basket sprite BMP_001 placed at bottom-left quad of FRONT face. basketObj pointer stored, type=1, column=0, basketColumn=0.

prompts.title: Egg Spawning and Falling
prompts.notes: Constants EGG_FALL_SPEED=6.0f, SPAWN_DELAY_TICKS=20, EGG_START_Y. Egg spawns random column, falls at constant speed, deleted at bottom. catchEgg/missEgg stubs just delete egg and reset delay. initGame() called at end of on_init() temporarily.
